AM.T: But Samuel declared: “Does the LORD delight in burnt offerings and sacrifices as much as in obedience to His voice? Behold, obedience is better than sacrifice, and attentiveness is better than the fat of rams.

PM.T: Beware of false prophets. They come to you in sheep’s clothing, but inwardly they are ravenous wolves.

AM.T: Do not withhold good from the deserving when it is within your power to act.

PM.T: For everyone who asks receives; he who seeks finds; and to him who knocks, the door will be opened.

AM.T: and if My people who are called by My name humble themselves and pray and seek My face and turn from their wicked ways, then I will hear from heaven, forgive their sin, and heal their land.

PM.T: But many who are first will be last, and the last will be first.”

AM.T: O LORD, You have searched me and known me.

PM.T: Be sober-minded and alert. Your adversary the devil prowls around like a roaring lion, seeking someone to devour.

AM.T: Make a joyful noise to the LORD, all the earth.

PM.T: Rejoice with those who rejoice; weep with those who weep.

AM.T: Preserve me, O God, for in You I take refuge.

PM.T: On many past occasions and in many different ways, God spoke to our fathers through the prophets. But in these last days He has spoken to us by His Son, whom He appointed heir of all things, and through whom He made the universe.

AM.T: In my distress I called upon the LORD; I cried out to my God. And from His temple He heard my voice, and my cry for help reached His ears.

PM.T: In everything, I showed you that by this kind of hard work we must help the weak, remembering the words of the Lord Jesus Himself: ‘It is more blessed to give than to receive.’”

AM.T: You will seek Me and find Me when you search for Me with all your heart.

PM.T: Keep your lives free from the love of money and be content with what you have, for God has said: “Never will I leave you, never will I forsake you.”

AM.T: You have made known to me the path of life; You will fill me with joy in Your presence, with eternal pleasures at Your right hand.

PM.T: But wisdom is vindicated by all her children.”

AM.T: For You have delivered my soul from death, and my feet from stumbling, that I may walk before God in the light of life.

PM.T: A bruised reed He will not break, and a smoldering wick He will not extinguish, till He leads justice to victory.

AM.T: Hear, O Israel: The LORD our God, the LORD is One.

PM.T: Then I saw heaven standing open, and there before me was a white horse. And its rider is called Faithful and True.

AM.T: A crucible for silver and a furnace for gold, but the LORD is the tester of hearts.

PM.T: Each of you should look not only to your own interests, but also to the interests of others.

AM.T: He said: “The LORD is my rock, my fortress, and my deliverer.

PM.T: And He told them, “The harvest is plentiful, but the workers are few. Ask the Lord of the harvest, therefore, to send out workers into His harvest.

AM.T: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom, and knowledge of the Holy One is understanding.

PM.T: And if I go and prepare a place for you, I will come back and welcome you into My presence, so that you also may be where I am.

AM.T: Wisdom is the focus of the discerning, but the eyes of a fool wander to the ends of the earth.

PM.T: The eye is the lamp of the body. If your eyes are good, your whole body will be full of light.

AM.T: As for me, I will behold Your face in righteousness; when I awake, I will be satisfied in Your presence.

PM.T: For God so loved the world that He gave His one and only Son, that everyone who believes in Him shall not perish but have eternal life.

AM.T: But blessed is the man who trusts in the LORD, whose confidence is in Him.

PM.T: Come to Me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest.

AM.T: The LORD is my strength and my song, and He has become my salvation.

PM.T: For God is not a God of disorder, but of peace

AM.T: so My word that proceeds from My mouth will not return to Me empty, but it will accomplish what I please, and it will prosper where I send it.

PM.T: Now that faith has come, we are no longer under a guardian.

AM.T: So let us know — let us press on to know the LORD. As surely as the sun rises, He will appear; He will come to us like the rain, like the spring showers that water the earth.

PM.T: For it is better, if it is God’s will, to suffer for doing good than for doing evil.

AM.T: You have given me Your shield of salvation; Your right hand upholds me, and Your gentleness exalts me.

PM.T: He answered, “‘Love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your strength and with all your mind’ and ‘Love your neighbor as yourself.’”

AM.T: May He incline our hearts to Himself, to walk in all His ways

PM.T: For God has not called us to impurity, but to holiness.

AM.T: Every word of God is flawless; He is a shield to those who take refuge in Him.

PM.T: For it has been granted to you on behalf of Christ not only to believe in Him, but also to suffer for Him,

AM.T: Plans fail for lack of counsel, but with many advisers they succeed.

PM.T: Is anyone cheerful? He should sing praises.

AM.T: The grass withers and the flowers fall, but the word of our God stands forever.”

PM.T: Let us not neglect meeting together, as some have made a habit, but let us encourage one another, and all the more as you see the Day approaching.

AM.T: I have loved you with an everlasting love; therefore I have drawn you with loving devotion.

PM.T: And we know that God works all things together for the good of those who love Him, who are called according to His purpose.

AM.T: The LORD loves righteousness and justice; the earth is full of His loving devotion.

PM.T: for I know whom I have believed, and I am convinced that He is able to guard what I have entrusted to Him for that day.

AM.T: Pleasant words are a honeycomb, sweet to the soul and healing to the bones.

PM.T: Grace and peace to you from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.

AM.T: A man’s heart plans his course, but the LORD determines his steps.

PM.T: For our struggle is not against flesh and blood, but against the rulers, against the authorities, against the powers of this world’s darkness, and against the spiritual forces of evil in the heavenly realms.

AM.T: And you shall love the LORD your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your strength.

PM.T: Rejoice in the Lord always. I will say it again: Rejoice!

AM.T: The LORD your God is among you; He is mighty to save.

PM.T: Finally, all of you, be like-minded and sympathetic, love as brothers, be tenderhearted and humble.
